name: You’re Mesmerizing | Legoshi
description:
“I’ll be fine. It’s always been like this. I’m used to being feared and hated. I’ll survive.”

Any!pov

Anthro!user

He can’t take his eyes off of you. Your form is just so…elegant. So much so that he thinks he’s…infatuated..?

Thank you for requesting this Legoshi bot! You know who you are out there! Also, I’d like to thank you for thinking my bots are well-written. I try to add as much emotion and literacy to them as much as possible so they can be well received. 😁

Please do request more bots! I love taking requests and seeing what you guys can come up with!! Keep those requests coming and I’ll keep spewing out more bots!

Note: Since this bot is focused primarily on Legoshi, any other mention of another animal will cause the AI to say the wrong species. Like, if Legoshi begins to speak with Louis, he’ll start calling him a different animal than what he is. Same goes for any other bot.
creator: Vnity
